dir: onchange="onchange$EmployeeNonworkingDay$IDNumber(this);" &OnSelectionOutline; select 'active$EmployeeNonworkingDay(this);' as message return select 'close$EmployeeNonworkingDay(this);' as message return declare @ho_ten nvarchar(256), @ma_nv varchar(32) select @ma_nv = rtrim(ma_nv), @ho_ten = rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + ten_nv from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @ma_nv as ma_nv, @ho_ten as ho_ten return declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$duplicate nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Thông tin lịch nghỉ cho nhân viên đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$duplicate = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Đã tồn tại khoảng thời gian giao cắt với thông tin đang cập nhật.' else N'The date range must not be overlapped or duplicated..' end if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and thu = @thu and ngay_hl_tu = @ngay_hl_tu) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$exists as message return end if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and thu = @thu and ((ngay_hl_den is not null and @ngay_hl_tu between ngay_hl_tu and ngay_hl_den) or (@ngay_hl_den is not null and ngay_hl_tu between @ngay_hl_tu and @ngay_hl_den))) begin select 'ngay_hl_tu' as field, @$duplicate as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID if @@language = 'V' select b.ma_bp, b.ten_bp from hrnv a join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec else select b.ma_bp, b.ten_bp2 from hrnv a join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec return if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and thu = $thu.OldValue and ngay_hl_tu = $ngay_hl_tu.OldValue) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if ((@stt_rec <> $stt_rec.OldValue) or (@thu <> $thu.OldValue) or (@ngay_hl_tu <> $ngay_hl_tu.OldValue)) begin if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and thu = @thu and ngay_hl_tu = @ngay_hl_tu and not (stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and thu = $thu.OldValue and ngay_hl_tu = $ngay_hl_tu.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$exists as message return end end if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and thu = @thu and not (stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and thu = $thu.OldValue and ngay_hl_tu = $ngay_hl_tu.OldValue) and ((ngay_hl_den is not null and @ngay_hl_tu between ngay_hl_tu and ngay_hl_den) or (@ngay_hl_den is not null and ngay_hl_tu between @ngay_hl_tu and @ngay_hl_den))) begin select 'ngay_hl_tu' as field, @$duplicate as message return end update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and thu = $thu.OldValue and ngay_hl_tu = $ngay_hl_tu.OldValue if @@language = 'V' select b.ma_bp, b.ten_bp from hrnv a join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec else select b.ma_bp, b.ten_bp2 from hrnv a join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec return var f = this, v = f.getItem('thu'); f.getItem('ten_thu%l').value = v.options[v.selectedIndex].text; /* */ function active$EmployeeNonworkingDay(f) {f.add_onResponseComplete(on$EmployeeNonworkingDay$ResponseComplete);} function onchange$EmployeeNonworkingDay$IDNumber(o) {o.parentForm.request('IDNumber', 'IDNumber', ['ma_nv']);} function close$EmployeeNonworkingDay(f) {try {f.remove_onResponseComplete(on$EmployeeNonworkingDay$ResponseComplete)} catch (ex) {}} function on$EmployeeNonworkingDay$ResponseComplete(sender, e) { var f = e.object, context = e.type.Context, result = e.type.Result; switch (context) { case 'IDNumber': f.setItemControlBehavior('stt_rec', result[0].Value, true); break; default: break; } } /* */ &OutlineEntry; if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv return end &OutlineCss;
